title: hylocereus guatemalensis
intro: Hylocereus guatemalensis, also known as the Guatemalan night-blooming cereus or queen of the night, is a species of flowering cactus native to Central America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Hylocereus guatemalensis include its ability to help reduce stress and promote better sleep, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or capsules, and are often used to aid in relaxation and reduce inflammation.
